name: docs
tagline: Collaborative markdown docs — live multi-cursor editing over vault notes, shared by capability link.

tags.name: doc
tags.description: Working tag for the Docs surface — notes carrying it appear in the doc list and are editable collaboratively.

tags.name: surface-acl/docs
tags.description: Grant rows for the Docs surface (vault-native GrantStore) — one note per share/grant; revocation = delete the note. The surface credential needs read/write on this tag as well as on the working tag.
